title: Create: Alloyed by zeke
description:
A mod that add mining to get andersite alloyed in create the mod
This will make alloyed for the mines not the trees in the overwolrd
body:
Alloyed adds an alternative way to produce Andesite Alloy by mining a unique ore found deep in caves, rather than relying on the traditional tree-based recipes from the Create mod. This mod is designed to integrate smoothly with any version of Create, but if the Create mod is not present, the ore will still generate naturally in the world — though it will be unusable for crafting.

How it works:

Explore underground to find the new Alloyed Ore embedded in cave walls.

Mine the ore to collect raw materials for Andesite Alloy.

Smelt the ore in a standard furnace to prepare it for alloying.

Use a Blast Furnace or the Create mod’s Blasting Machine to complete the alloying process and obtain Andesite Alloy.

This approach encourages exploration and mining, giving players a fresh way to gather materials for Create mod machinery and components without needing to farm trees or depend on other methods.

Compatible with all Create mod versions, Alloyed ensures your world generation and crafting options stay flexible. Perfect for players who want to expand their resource gathering with immersive, cave-focused gameplay.

Special thanks to the creator of the Create mod for their amazing work and inspiration.

Disclaimer: Without the Create mod installed, this mod’s features may not function as intended. The ore will generate but cannot be used for crafting or processing.
